assertions.description: MCU.sch has I2C_SDA and I2C_SCL global labels connecting to STM32F401 (U3) and FM24CL16B FRAM (U2), but bus_analysis.i2c=[] — bus is not detected. Additionally, crystal Y1 (20MHz) shows only one load cap (C30) in crystal_circuits, but C28 (also 22pF) is the second load cap — only half the crystal circuit is captured.
